cover_brief: Create a topic-specific TaraHome blog cover for an article about Home Assistant, Matter bridge expectations, and cross-ecosystem sharing to Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa, and SmartThings.
final_execution: The configured local generator was run first. Its diagram-style candidates failed visual inspection because they included routing/path overlays and framed panels. The final cover is a post-local Tara-owned composite using the local hub hardware scene and a warm residential source image, written to the required unique article path.
must_not_have: fake chart or generic AI diagram
